response.content: {"description": "A large-diaphragm condenser studio microphone with a matte champagne/silver metallic body. The upper capsule section features a cylindrical fine-mesh metal grille in a darker silver tone. The body bears engraved text reading 'PHANTO' (partially visible, implying 'PHANTOM'), 'classic', and 'Nr. 1307', along with a circular logo mark. The microphone is mounted in a silver spider shock mount with elastic suspension bands, attached to a black mic stand with a locking lever. A round black pop filter on a gooseneck arm is positioned in front of the capsule.", "consistencyTag": "silver-condenser-mic-phantom-classic", "suggestedToken": "PHANTOM_CLASSIC_MIC"}
